import os
os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')
cfg_path = "habitat-lab/habitat/config/benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml"
with open(cfg_path, 'r') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
    for line in lines:
        if "success" in line.lower() or "terminate" in line.lower() or "measure" in line.lower() or "nav_to_pos" in line.lower():
            print(line.strip())
